literal_meaning: path or state of the deathless
definition: Compound in which amata governs the deathless side of the consummation interface.
notes: Use the path-oriented rendering when the phrase is functioning as a practical formula, as in appamādo amatapadaṃ. Do not import eternal-life language.

example_phrases.translation: heedfulness is the path to the deathless
example_phrases.notes: Classic practical formula governed by the amata family.
